message:
feat(parallel-parser): add deterministic scheduler transcript with dispatch tracking and replay validation

Introduce ScheduleDispatch records capturing per-step worker-slot
assignments, a splitmix64-based deterministic execution order keyed
to seed and plan hash, and a self-validating transcript_hash. The
core parse() function now builds the transcript before lexing and
processes chunks in transcripted order rather than sequentially.

replay_schedule_transcript() validates plan-hash, worker-count,
permutation integrity, dispatch alignment, and transcript-hash to
guarantee bit-exact replay. TranscriptReplayError enum provides 11
failure variants for precise diagnostics. Extends the interference
gate's compare_transcripts() to cover the new dispatch and hash fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
